title: Project hangs when loading in the editor
symptom: The project freezes shortly after loading in the editor, making it unresponsive. Attempts to interact with the project are met with delays or complete freezing.
applies_when: Loading a project in the editor
not_this_if: No components are causing the freeze
root_cause: The freezing issue may be caused by specific components or workflows that are not compatible or are malfunctioning, leading to performance issues in the editor. Safe Mode allows for troubleshooting by disabling certain functionalities.
fix_steps: Enable Safe Mode in the project settings
Disable workflows by adding a passthrough set to false
Set elements to not render to identify the problematic component
Test the project to see if it still hangs
agent_instruction: Enable Safe Mode and disable workflows to troubleshoot the freezing issue.
